# Habit Tracker Ai MCP

> Track habits, streaks, and build accountability

`habit-tracker-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install habit-tracker-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx habit-tracker-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `create_habit` — Create new habit
- `log_completion` — Log habit completion
- `get_habit_streak` — Get current streak
- `get_habit_history` — Get habit history
- `get_all_habits` — Get all habits
- `delete_habit` — Delete habit
- `get_weekly_stats` — Get weekly stats

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/habit-tracker-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/habit-tracker-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
